title: Annual Report — Financial Highlights FY2025
summary: Financial highlights section of the Northwind Digital Solutions FY2025 annual report covering revenue, profitability, segment breakdown, and forward guidance.
author: Diana Kowalski
figure_1_alt: Line chart showing five-year revenue growth from $12M to $34.2M
figure_2_alt: Pie chart showing revenue distribution across three segments
outlook: For FY2026, we project revenue growth of 20–25% driven by continued expansion of Platform Services and the launch of our AI-augmented integration offering in Q2. We expect EBITDA margins to improve to 28–30% as platform revenue scales.
